subparts.text: What are the MOS Scaling trends and state its effect on deep submicron region of operation. 2.5

How can the gate oxide leakage be reduced? What are the specifications of such materials? Name such materials which the researchers are exploring/suggesting could help in reducing the gate oxide leakage.

questions.question_text: Attempt any one part i. Differentiate between Defects, Errors and Faults. Discuss about any one digital fault or analog fault with a diagram. ii. Write a short note on: Deep Submicron IC Reliability What are the various steps involved in VLSI Testing? Discuss about the Test generation for combinational circuits
